typecheck.details: no issues found in 18 source files

lint.command: cd quant-dashboard && python3 -m ruff check src/
lint.details: All checks passed after fixing 3 issues: 2 E501 line-too-long in src/i18n.py (wrapped with parentheses) and 1 F601 duplicate dict key (removed duplicate '📈 Stock Analysis' entry)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update port reference from 8501 to 8020 to match services.yaml. Change 'Port Range: 8501 (Streamlit default)' to 'Port Range: 8020 (Streamlit, see services.yaml)'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviewers across rounds flagged the mismatch. AGENTS.md says port 8501, services.yaml declares port 8020. Workers correctly used 8020 from services.yaml.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update baseline test count from '133 existing tests' to '201 tests' (current count) in Testing & Validation Guidance section.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: AGENTS.md says '133 existing tests must always pass' but the actual count is now 201 after three milestones of feature work.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add i18n key naming convention to the i18n section: 'Translation keys must be human-readable English text (e.g., "Total Return", not "total_return") so the t() function returns the key itself for English mode.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The i18n-streamlit-ui feature used machine-readable identifiers as keys, causing the English UI to display raw keys instead of readable labels. This was the root cause of the blocking issue in round 1, fixed in fix-i18n-english-keys.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Backend-worker skill should include a visual UI verification step for Streamlit features: 'For Streamlit UI features, verify the visual output using agent-browser or manual inspection, not just health-check and tests.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The i18n-streamlit-ui worker passed all tests and health checks but didn't visually verify the English UI, missing the broken English labels. A browser-based check would have caught this. Same finding in round 2 review.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md i18n key convention gap (from fix-i18n-english-keys review)
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate — already captured in suggestedGuidanceUpdates from round 1, carried forward
